info.title: OT Companion Asset Management API Manufactured OpenAPI
info.summary: OT Companion® enables continuous OT asset inventory monitoring and patch management for power system operators in utilities, industries and infrastructure verticals. Published API scope combines OT asset inventory, vulnerability context, and managed baseline records.
info.description: Manufactured OpenAPI artifact for OT Companion Asset Management API. This file was synthesized by Last Mile from curated research JSON and is not vendor-certified. Use it as an agent-consumable starting point, then validate paths, schemas, authentication, and server URLs with the vendor before production use. OT Companion® enables continuous OT asset inventory monitoring and patch management for power system operators in utilities, industries and infrastructure verticals. OT Companion is explicitly described as continuous OT asset inventory monitoring with baseline and vulnerability context, and its APIs are positioned as open integration surfaces. Asset data is Supported. Telemetry data is Supported. Writeback is Supported.

servers.description: Placeholder server template. Replace with the vendor-confirmed API host and base path before generating production clients.

externalDocs.description: Vendor documentation used as the primary public source for this manufactured contract.
